---
title: "Interaction templates"
sidebarTitle: "Interactions"
icon: "clipboard-list"
description: "Standardize AI-generated write-ups with interaction templates."
---

**Interaction templates** standardize the write-ups generated by the AI for different use cases. For example:

- a **summary** after a candidate or client meeting;
- a **pre-qualification** of a candidate over the phone;
- and many other cases depending on your needs.

Each template defines the expected structure of the write-up, for consistent output from one interaction to the next.
